Interface EmployeeDao

All Known Implementing Classes:
InMemoryEmployeeDao, JdbcEmployeeDao
public interface EmployeeDao
Defines database operations for managing employee records.

Implementations of this interface handle retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting employees.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EmployeeRecord
    addEmployee(String name, String pin, String role, boolean active)
    Adds a new employee.
    void
    deleteEmployee(int employeeId)
    Deletes an employee from the system.
    List<EmployeeRecord>
    getEmployees()
    Retrieves all employees from the data source.
    void
    setEmployeeActive(int employeeId, boolean active)
    Sets the active status of an employee.
    void
    updateEmployee(int employeeId, String name, String pin, String role, boolean active)
    Updates an existing employee's information.

  • Method Details

    • getEmployees

      List<EmployeeRecord> getEmployees()
      Retrieves all employees from the data source.
      Returns:
      a list of employee records

    • addEmployee

      EmployeeRecord addEmployee(String name, String pin, String role, boolean active)
      Adds a new employee.
      Parameters:
      name - employee name
      pin - employee login PIN
      role - employee role
      active - whether the employee is active
      Returns:
      the created employee record

    • updateEmployee

      void updateEmployee(int employeeId, String name, String pin, String role, boolean active)
      Updates an existing employee's information.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee id
      name - employee name
      pin - employee PIN
      role - employee role
      active - whether the employee is active

    • setEmployeeActive

      void setEmployeeActive(int employeeId, boolean active)
      Sets the active status of an employee.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee id
      active - true to activate, false to deactivate

    • deleteEmployee

      void deleteEmployee(int employeeId)
      Deletes an employee from the system.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee id
